ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine the sensor is attached to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the sensor should be calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the machine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the machine was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine */,
  "maintenance_log" TEXT /* Log of maintenance activities and notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data collected */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor data */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of data collection */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being predicted */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  "prediction_training" INTEGER /* Training data used to generate the prediction */,
  "prediction" INTEGER /* Predicted value */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the data point */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was generated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Likelihood of an anomaly */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Additional performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "generated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warp_distances" (
  "warp_distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warp distance */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being predicted */,
  "warp_distance" REAL /* Warp distance calculated */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction associated with the warp distance */,
  "warp_distance_type" TEXT /* Type of warp distance calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warp_distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warp_distances_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warp_distances_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being predicted */,
  "threshold_training" INTEGER /* Training data used to calculate the threshold */,
  "distance_threshold" REAL /* Distance threshold calculated */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction associated with the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of threshold */,
  "threshold_status" TEXT /* Status of the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)
